markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 662. Motorcycle Operator Training & Safety
##### § 662.001 — Administration of Program

The department shall administer a motorcycle operator training and safety program and enforce the laws governing the program.

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 595 (S.B.616), Sec. 8.002, eff. September 1, 2020.*

subsections.text: The department shall administer a motorcycle operator training and safety program and enforce the laws governing the program.
